inputs.label: Primary Voltage (V)
inputs.businessContext: The voltage applied to the primary winding of the transformer.

businessContext_i18n.en: The voltage applied to the primary winding of the transformer.
businessContext_i18n.de: Die an die Primärwicklung des Transformators angelegte Spannung.
businessContext_i18n.fr: La tension appliquée à l'enroulement primaire du transformateur.
businessContext_i18n.es: La tensión aplicada al devanado primario del transformador.
businessContext_i18n.ar: الجهد المطبق على الملف الابتدائي للمحول.

inputs.label: Secondary Voltage (V)
inputs.businessContext: The desired or measured voltage at the secondary winding.

businessContext_i18n.en: The desired or measured voltage at the secondary winding.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Sekonder sargıda istenen veya ölçülen gerilim.
businessContext_i18n.de: Die gewünschte oder gemessene Spannung an der Sekundärwicklung.
businessContext_i18n.fr: La tension souhaitée ou mesurée à l'enroulement secondaire.
businessContext_i18n.es: Tensión deseada o medida en el devanado secundario.
businessContext_i18n.ar: الجهد المطلوب أو المقاس عند الملف الثانوي.

inputs.label: Power Rating (VA)
inputs.businessContext: The apparent power (volt-ampere) rating of the transformer.

businessContext_i18n.en: The apparent power (volt-ampere) rating of the transformer.

inputs.label: Primary Turns
inputs.businessContext: Number of turns in the primary winding.

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of turns in the primary winding.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre de spires de l'enroulement primaire.
businessContext_i18n.es: Número de espiras en el devanado primario.
